docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-13-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BACHAR, BRYAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEONARD, WANYEE (3 E PRODUCTIONS) $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,100.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
